courses.subject: OVSC
courses.title: Guided Studies

meetings.instructor:
Ms. HUNG Pui Chee, 
Professor THAM Chee Yung Clement

courses.description:
To attend seminars/workshops and carry out assignments for the purposes of increasing knowledge of the research area and improving experimental design and data analysis.

Distinction (DI), Pass(PA) or Failure(FA) will be proposed by the supervisor(s) to the Division Head and Department Chairman for comment and endorsement.
courses.enrollment_requirement: For students in MPhil Ophthalmology & Visual Science
courses.learning_outcomes: Students are expected to perform literature review, raise scientific question and form study hypothesis for the research project(s) under the supervision of his/her supervisor(s)
courses.course_syllabus:
1. Research ideas and concepts
2. Research methods
3. Research design
4. Literature review
courses.feedback_evaluation: Oral and/or written feedback to supervisor(s) and/or division Head
courses.required_readings:
1. Student handbook
2. Online literature search for topics relevant to student’s research direction and subjects.
courses.recommended_readings:
1. Student handbook
2. Online literature search for topics relevant to student’s research direction and subjects.

courses.subject: OVSC
courses.title: Seminar
courses.description:
To present a seminar summarizing research work performed in the previous year.

Seminars will be graded according to the average mark from all attending faculty members based on a standardized making sheet.
courses.enrollment_requirement: For students in MPhil Ophthalmology & Visual Science
courses.learning_outcomes: Students are expected to present his/her research project(s), with a detailed literature review, study background, scientific questions and hypothesis, and a preliminary study proposal
courses.course_syllabus:
1. Critical literature review
2. Research ideas
3. Project design
courses.feedback_evaluation: Oral and/or written feedback to supervisor(s) and/or division Head
courses.required_readings:
1. Student handbook
2. Online literature search for topics relevant to student’s research direction and subjects.
courses.recommended_readings:
1. Student handbook
2. Online literature search for topics relevant to student’s research direction and subjects.

courses.subject: OVSC
courses.title: Guided Studies
courses.description:
To attend seminars/workshops and carry out assignments for the purposes of increasing knowledge of the research area and improving experimental design and data analysis.

Distinction (DI), Pass(PA) or Failure (FA) will be proposed by the supervisor(s) to the Division Head and Department Chairman for comment and endorsement.
courses.enrollment_requirement: For students in PhD Ophthalmology & Visual Science
courses.learning_outcomes: Students are expected to design the research project(s), propose study methods and data analysis, and interpret the results under the supervision of his/her supervisor(s)
courses.course_syllabus:
1. Bioinformatics & biostatistics
2. Data analysis
3. Data interpretation
4. Manuscript writing
courses.feedback_evaluation: Oral and/or written feedback to supervisor(s) and/or division Head
courses.required_readings:
1. Student handbook
2. Online literature search for topics relevant to student’s research direction and subjects.
courses.recommended_readings:
1. Student handbook
2. Online literature search for topics relevant to student’s research direction and subjects.

courses.subject: OVSC
courses.title: Seminar
courses.description:
To present a seminar summarizing research work performed in the previous year.

Seminars will be graded according to the average mark from all attending faculty members based on a standardized making sheet.
courses.enrollment_requirement: For students in PhD Ophthalmology & Visual Science
courses.learning_outcomes: Students are expected to present his/her research project(s), with adequate literature review, introduction, study hypothesis and aims, methods, results, discussion, and perspectives.
courses.course_syllabus:
1. Project design
2. Detailed methods
3. Data analysis
4. Interim results and summary
5. Interpretation of results
6. Critical review of relevant topics and discussion
7. Perspectives and future research plan
courses.feedback_evaluation: Oral and/or written feedback to supervisor(s) and/or division Head
courses.required_readings:
1. Student handbook
2. Online literature search for topics relevant to student’s research direction and subjects.
courses.recommended_readings:
1. Student handbook
2. Online literature search for topics relevant to student’s research direction and subjects.

courses.subject: OVSC
courses.title: Research
courses.description:
To conduct research work on the assigned research topic.

Grading of Guided Studies and Research will be proposed by the supervisor(s) to the Division Head and Department Chairman for comment and endorsement.
courses.enrollment_requirement: For students in MPhil Ophthalmology & Visual Science
courses.learning_outcomes: Students are expected to conduct the research projects independently, under the supervision of his/her supervisor(s)
courses.feedback_evaluation: Oral and/or written feedback to supervisor(s) and/or division Head
courses.required_readings: Online and printed literatures relevant to student’s research projects.
courses.recommended_readings: Online and printed literatures relevant to student’s research projects.
